subcodes.title: Words to some friends, spoken on 1914-12-01
subcodes.first_line: The world is the plane of creation and disintegration. The process never stops: on one hand it creates new people
subcodes.first_line_orig: این دنیا عالم کون و فساد است عالم خسته نمیشود
subcodes.subjects: @continual renewal of creation, @creation of the world, @composition and decomposition
